scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run tauri build && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src-tauri/target/release/bundle -Filter *.exe -Recurse | Copy-Item -Destination . -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path src-tauri/target/release/bundle -Filter *.msi -Recurse | Copy-Item -Destination . -Force; Copy-Item src-tauri/target/release/tauri-app.exe .\LaunchPad.exe -Force"
